specs.title: cp-000: Filter changes trigger a new search only after the user has already searched and
cp-001: Toggling filters before the first search updates local state only and does not a
cp-002: Sort dropdown default label is Relevance
cp-003: Sort trigger shows SortAscending icon plus the active option label
cp-004: Clicking the sort trigger toggles the dropdown open and closed
cp-005: Sort dropdown contains exactly Relevance Citations Year Newest and Evidence Leve
cp-006: Selecting a sort option updates sort closes the dropdown and reruns search if th
cp-007: Current sort option is highlighted with text-brand font-medium inside the dropdo
cp-008: Sort dropdown does not currently implement outside-click dismissal or Escape-key
cp-009: Source-count summary line includes PubMed Semantic Scholar OpenAlex ClinicalTria
cp-010: Source-count summary is shown only after a successful search with at least one r
cp-011: AI-optimized-query toggle is rendered only when augmentedQueries exists in the r
cp-012: AI-optimized-query toggle label switches between Show AI-optimized queries and H
cp-013: Expanded augmented-query panel renders three labeled rows PubMed S2 and OpenAlex
cp-014: Main loading state shows four pulsing glass cards instead of a spinner or linear
cp-015: Main error state renders red text inside a centered GlassPanel
cp-016: showEmptyState is true only when the page is not loading and the user has not se
cp-017: showNoResults is true only when the page is not loading the user has searched th
cp-018: No-results message reads No results found Try a different query
cp-019: Result title links to httpsdoiorgdoi when DOI is present
cp-020: If DOI is absent but PMID is present result title links to httpspubmedncbinlmnih
cp-021: If neither DOI nor PMID is present result title renders as plain text with no ex
cp-022: Authors row shows at most the first three authors followed by et al when more th
cp-023: Metadata row always renders journal year even when citation count is absent
cp-024: DOI metadata link is rendered separately in the metadata row when DOI exists
cp-025: Abstract preview is shown only when abstract is truthy and is clamped to two lin
cp-026: TLDR line is shown only when tldr is truthy and is prefixed with TLDR
cp-027: Save-button identity key is derived from doi pmid s2Id title
cp-028: Save button is disabled when that identity key is already in saved or savingKeys
cp-029: Save button label changes through Save Saving and Saved
cp-030: Successful save adds the identity key to the local saved set
cp-031: Save failures log Failed to save paper to the console and do not show a toast or
cp-032: Save Cite button is always enabled in the current implementation and has no load
cp-033: Save Cite stores scholarsync_pending_citation in sessionStorage
cp-034: Save Cite payload includes title authors journal year doi and pmid
